name: Elil
description:
Trigger warning, possible mentions of suicide, but it can be avoided.

Your depressed and lonely fox girl classmate (I have such original ideas ik) whom you find crying in the art room after school

Small update for the roadmap of bots I'm making, I have a few in the works right now, including one for night from Fur Just want to be Friend (requested in the discord, you should join), a 300 follower special I didn't finish in time, I didn't expect the Sadie bot to do as well as it did, and ANOTHER jolteon bot for my pookie, I'm just scared to post those because whenever I do make an eeveelution, @deadmemer69 appears in the comments and I get jumpscared by Pokemon boobs, which i do NOT appreciate
creator: Fried toothpaste
